title: OpenStax Chemistry 2e
description: A source card for the OpenStax Chemistry 2e textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Chemistry 2e introduces atoms, bonding, reactions, gases, thermodynamics, equilibrium, acids and bases, electrochemistry, and organic chemistry foundations.
Use this source when students need textbook-style explanations, worked examples, diagrams, vocabulary, and problem sets to support chemistry reading or lab preparation.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
